strengths: 19+ years of software engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems exceeds the 15-year requirement with demonstrated depth
Proven cloud and infrastructure expertise with AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD infrastructure setup
Entrepreneurial track record as GISCollective founder and experience at multiple startups (RIDE Capital, Optilyz, WatchUp) with mentorship and knowledge-sharing activities
concerns: Limited demonstrated AI/ML expertise—recent AI-adjacent work is only 6 months at re:cinq on MCP code generators and agent infrastructure, insufficient for 'recognized expertise in AI' requirement
No master's degree or PhD in AI-related field despite this being a preferred qualification for an AI Strategy role
Career disruption with 7+ month gap since October 2025 and brief tenure at the most AI-focused position raises questions about specialization commitment

key_factors.factor: AI/ML expertise gap vs. role requirement
Cloud infrastructure and full-stack engineering depth
Recent career gap and short AI-focused tenure

response.justification: Bogdan has strong foundational software engineering credentials and relevant cloud infrastructure experience, but the role explicitly requires recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI products—neither of which is evident in the resume. His six-month exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq is insufficient to establish director-level AI strategy capability. While his full-stack depth and entrepreneurial background are valuable, they position him as a talented software craftsperson rather than an AI-focused strategic technologist. The recent career gap further compounds concerns about commitment to AI specialization.
